what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata stub for a JPEG image asset in the design-source channel; it records an id, address, channel, path, blob pointer, MIME type, name, dimensions, source label, author session, creation timestamp, and an empty links list, followed by a one-line source note.
observations: The file describes an image/jpeg asset named recent-pitches/p-22
Width and height are recorded as 0
The body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-22.jpg'
standouts: Recorded image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image record
The asset is identified by a stable image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-22 address plus a blob pointer
It is explicitly tagged as design ground-truth material
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate missing or failed image metadata extraction
No alt text, caption, or content description is provided
No links or relationships are recorded, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
notes: A sparse, addressable ledger card for a design-source pitch image, with a blob pointer but no extracted dimensions or relationships.
questions: Why are the width and height values zero?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-22.jpg contain?
How is this image intended to be referenced or used by other files?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as SOURCE design ground-truth for a recent pitch image; the file does act as a metadata record for that image, but the missing dimensions and empty links mean it is less informative than a full asset card.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a design pitch image in a channel memory ledger so it can be discovered, attributed, and referenced by its blob and channel address.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, addressable metadata record for a design-source image asset, including a blob pointer and authorship timestamp that a fused system could use to locate and attribute the underlying image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for a JPEG image named recent-pitches/p-22 in the design-source channel, referencing blob b2:514eb0d7f56be7186665e9681560690f with zero recorded dimensions and no outgoing links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-source pitch image with a stable identifier, provenance, and blob reference for later retrieval or linking.
